item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Juicy chicken in spiced curry with steamed rice and fresh chives. With toasted coconut flakes, juicy raisins, fresh pineapple and crunchy peanuts. (4+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Moroccan lamb tagine braised with seasonal vegetables and dried apricot, served with coarse couscous tossed with herbs and topped with drained yoghurt sprinkled with sweet chilli. With green salad tossed with sumac and lemon. (1+6+13+15) Moroccan mushroom tagine braised with seasonal vegetables and dried apricot, served with coarse couscous tossed with herbs and topped with drained yoghurt sprinkled with sweet chilli. With green salad tossed with sumac and lemon. (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic lasagne with slow-cooked bolognese, sweet tomato sauce and velvety béchamel, just as we all know and love it. (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Lasagne with juicy aubergines, sweet tomato sauce and velvety béchamel. Mama Mia! (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Korean meatballs with depth and umami, served with kimchi and chewy noodles tossed in sesame and fresh herbs. (1+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Crispy vegetable balls with depth and umami, served with kimchi and chewy noodles tossed in sesame and fresh herbs. (1+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Tender pulled turkey stir-fried with rice and crisp vegetables, tossed in sweet orange-hoisin sauce and topped with crunchy bean sprouts and fresh spring onions. With steamed bok choy with a nutty sesame dressing. (7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Crispy eggs stir-fried with rice and seasonal vegetables, tossed in sweet orange-hoisin sauce and topped with crunchy bean sprouts and fresh spring onions. With steamed bok choy with a nutty sesame dressing. (2+7+8+13+15)
